name: Tsenaya Nadari
description:
Tsenaya Nadari in "Waykeepers" by Scappo

In the comic series, Tsenaya Nadari is a skilled Jackal mechanic and the daughter of Nailah Nadari.

The plot follows Tsenaya and her mother, who both share a powerful djinni, Cebron.

While her mother, a "priest-governor," wants her to pursue a more respectable path, Tsenaya is more comfortable in the mechanic bays, fixing machines.
creator: Cyberdragon08
